query:
INSERT INTO crews (
  name, equipmentType, dayRate, costPerDay,
  hoursPerDay, crewMemberCount, memberWageCents, burdenPct,
  equipmentItems,
  machineBurnRateGph, fuelPriceCents, truckFuelPerDayCents,
  teethCostPerSetCents, daysPerSet, annualMajorWearCents, miscConsumablesPerDayCents,
  overheadItems,
  workingDaysPerMonth, targetMarginPct, acresPerDay
) VALUES
-- Crew 1: Solo Tracked Mulcher (owner-operator, 1 man, 1 machine — most common small TN operator setup)
(
  'Solo Tracked Mulcher', 'Tracked Forestry Mulcher', 2200, 0,
  9, 1, 2500, 0,
  '[{"name":"Tracked Forestry Mulcher (lease/payment)","monthlyCostCents":450000}]',
  7, 399, 4500,
  220000, 10, 2640000, 10000,
  '[{"name":"Insurance","monthlyCostCents":35000},{"name":"Phone/Admin","monthlyCostCents":10000}]',
  22, 35, 3
),
-- Crew 2: Mulcher + Groundsman (2-man crew — operator plus laborer for brush piles, spotting, cleanup)
(
  'Mulcher + Groundsman', 'Tracked Forestry Mulcher', 2800, 0,
  9, 2, 2200, 12,
  '[{"name":"Tracked Forestry Mulcher (lease/payment)","monthlyCostCents":450000},{"name":"Crew Truck","monthlyCostCents":85000}]',
  7, 399, 8000,
  220000, 10, 2640000, 15000,
  '[{"name":"Insurance","monthlyCostCents":45000},{"name":"Phone/Admin","monthlyCostCents":10000}]',
  22, 35, 4
),
-- Crew 3: Mulcher + Skid Steer (2-machine crew — mulcher handles heavy brush, skid steer pushes debris and cleans edges)
(
  'Mulcher + Skid Steer', 'Forestry Mulcher & Skid Steer', 3800, 0,
  9, 2, 2400, 12,
  '[{"name":"Tracked Forestry Mulcher (lease/payment)","monthlyCostCents":450000},{"name":"Skid Steer (lease/payment)","monthlyCostCents":280000},{"name":"Equipment Trailer","monthlyCostCents":25000}]',
  10, 399, 9000,
  220000, 8, 3200000, 20000,
  '[{"name":"Insurance","monthlyCostCents":65000},{"name":"Phone/Admin","monthlyCostCents":10000}]',
  22, 35, 6
),
-- Crew 4: ROW/Brush Hog Crew (tractor-based, lower margin, volume work — right-of-way, pasture reclaim, utility corridors)
(
  'ROW / Brush Hog Crew', 'Tractor with Brush Hog', 1200, 0,
  9, 1, 2000, 0,
  '[{"name":"Tractor (lease/payment)","monthlyCostCents":180000},{"name":"Brush Hog Attachment","monthlyCostCents":15000}]',
  4, 399, 4000,
  45000, 20, 800000, 5000,
  '[{"name":"Insurance","monthlyCostCents":25000},{"name":"Phone/Admin","monthlyCostCents":8000}]',
  22, 30, 8
),
-- Crew 5: Full Site Prep Crew (mulcher + excavator + dump truck — full clearing + debris removal, larger commercial/dev jobs)
(
  'Full Site Prep Crew', 'Mulcher, Excavator & Haul', 6500, 0,
  9, 3, 2600, 15,
  '[{"name":"Tracked Forestry Mulcher (lease/payment)","monthlyCostCents":450000},{"name":"Excavator (lease/payment)","monthlyCostCents":550000},{"name":"Dump Truck (lease/payment)","monthlyCostCents":220000},{"name":"Equipment Trailer","monthlyCostCents":25000}]',
  14, 399, 15000,
  220000, 7, 4500000, 30000,
  '[{"name":"Insurance","monthlyCostCents":95000},{"name":"Disposal/Tipping Fees","monthlyCostCents":60000},{"name":"Phone/Admin","monthlyCostCents":12000}]',
  22, 35, 5
);
